name: UnverifiedContr_0x00C409
report: The function 0xba381f8f in the unverified MEV-related contract is unprotected—it lacks access control and can be invoked by any external address. The attacker called this function, tricking the contract into interacting with a fake pair contract under their control. The MEV contract deposited its token balance and performed a swapExactAmountIn, allowing the attacker to receive the swapped tokens and drain the entire balance. As a result, all balance in 0x00c409001c1900ddcda20000008e112417db003b has been drained.
